debug_info.goal:
x y : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird
kestrel_application :
  EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K x =
    EnchantedForest.Introduction.response EnchantedForest.Kestrel.K y
⊢ x = y

proof:
have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
        apply K.call
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        apply K.call
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
        _ = y := by rw [h₂]
failed_attempts:
calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
          have h := K.call x x
          exact h
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
          rw [kestrel_application]
        _ = y := by
          have h := K.call y x
          exact h
  end KestrelTheorems

rw [kestrel_application]
  calc
    x = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by rw [h₁]
    _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by rw [h₃]
    _ = y := by rw [h₂]

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := K.call y x
      have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
        calc
          (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := rfl
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
      have h₄ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
          _ = y := by rw [h₂]
      exact h₄
  end KestrelTheorems

have h₂ := K.call x x
    exact h₂
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    have h₃ := K.call y x
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

simp [h5]
      exact h4
    exact h3
  
  have h3 : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
    have h4 : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
      calc
        (K ◁ y) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := rfl
        _ = y := by
          -- Use the definition of K to simplify the expression
          have h5 := K.call y I
          -- Simplify using the given property of K
          simp [h5]
    exact h4
  
  have h4 : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h2]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h1]
      _ = y := by rw [h3]
  
  exact h4

apply K.call
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
      have h₄ := K.call y x
      exact h₄
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

have h₁ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
      have h₂ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
      have h₃ := K.call x (K ◁ y)
      simp [kestrel_application] at h₁ h₂ h₃ ⊢
      <;> simp_all [response]
      <;> aesop
  end KestrelTheorems
end EnchantedForest

x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [K.call x x]
    _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
    _ = y := by rw [K.call y x]

have h₁ := K.call x x
      have h₂ := K.call y y
      have h₃ := K.call x y
      have h₄ := K.call y x
      have h₅ : K ◁ x = K ◁ y := kestrel_application
      have h₆ := K.call (K ◁ x) x
      have h₇ := K.call (K ◁ y) y
      simp [h₅] at h₆ h₇
      <;>
      simp_all [response]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [response]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [response]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₈ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
          have h₉ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
          simp [h₅] at h₈ h₉
          <;>
          simp_all [response]
          <;>
          aesop
        })

apply K.call
    have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := by
      apply K.call
    have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by
      rw [kestrel_application]
    have h₄ : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h₁]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [h₃]
        _ = y := by rw [h₂]
    exact h₄
sorry

simp at h₃ h₄ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [I.call]
    <;> aesop
  have h₃ : y = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by
    have h₄ := K.call y I
    have h₅ := K.call y I
    simp at h₄ h₅ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [I.call]
    <;> aesop
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    have h₅ : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := h₁
    have h₆ : x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := h₂
    have h₇ : y = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := h₃
    have h₈ : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h₅]
    have h₉ : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := h₆
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h₈]
        _ = y := by
          have h₁₀ : y = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := h₃
          have h₁₁ : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
            rw [h₁₀]
            <;> simp [I.call]
          rw [h₁₁]
    exact h₉
  exact h₄

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
      apply K.call
    apply h₁
  
  have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
      have h₂₁ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        apply K.call
      apply h₂₁
    apply h₂
  
  have h3 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = x := by
    calc
      (K ◁ y) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      _ = x := h1
  
  have h4 : y = x := by
    calc
      y = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h2]
      _ = x := by rw [h3]
  
  apply h4.symm

have h₄ := K.call x I
    exact h₄
  have h₄ : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
    have h₅ := K.call y I
    exact h₅
  have h₅ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h₃]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [kestrel_application]
      _ = y := by rw [h₄]
  exact h₅

calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

apply K.call
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    apply K.call
  calc
    x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
    _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
    _ = y := by rw [h₂]

apply K.call
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
      apply K.call
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

have h₁ := K.call x K
      have h₂ := K.call y K
      have h₃ := K.call (K ◁ x) K
      have h₄ := K.call (K ◁ y) K
      simp [kestrel_application] at h₃ h₄
      <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try tauto) <;>
      (try simp_all [response]) <;>
      (try tauto)

have h₂ : ∀ (x y : Bird), (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x := K.call
    have h₃ := h₂ x I
    exact h₃
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
    have h₃ : ∀ (x y : Bird), (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x := K.call
    have h₄ := h₃ y I
    exact h₄
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

simp [response] at h₉ h₁₀ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try aesop
  }) <;>
  (try {
    have h₉ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
    have h₁₀ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
    simp [response] at h₉ h₁₀ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try aesop
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    have h₉ := K.call (K ◁ x) (K ◁ x)
    have h₁₀ := K.call (K ◁ y) (K ◁ y)
    simp [response] at h₉ h₁₀ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try aesop
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    have h₉ := K.call (K ◁ x) (K ◁ y)
    have h₁₀ := K.call (K ◁ y) (K ◁ x)
    simp [response] at h₉ h₁₀ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try aesop
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    have h₉ := K.call x (K ◁ y)
    have h₁₀ := K.call y (K ◁ x)
    simp [response] at h₉ h₁₀ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try aesop
  })
  <;>
  (try {
    have h₉ := K.call x (K ◁ x)
    have h₁₀ := K.call y (K ◁ y)
    have h₁₁ := K.call (K ◁ x) (K ◁ x)
    have h₁₂ := K.call (K ◁ y) (K ◁ y)
    simp [response] at h₉ h₁₀ h₁₁ h₁₂ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [response]
    <;> try aesop
  })

simp_all [response]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y := by
    have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y := by
      apply K.call
    exact h₃
  
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ y := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ y := by rw [h₂]
      _ = y := by rw [h₃]
  
  apply h₄

apply K.call
  have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    apply K.call
  have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h₄ : x = y := by
    calc
      x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
      _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
      _ = y := by rw [h₂]
  exact h₄

simp_all [response]
      -- Since K is a kestrel, K ◁ x is fixated on x, and K ◁ y is fixated on y
      -- Therefore, (K ◁ x) ◁ y = x and (K ◁ y) ◁ y = y
      -- Given K ◁ x = K ◁ y, we have x = y
      <;>
      (try simp_all) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try tauto)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₁₅ := K.call x y
          have h₁₆ := K.call y x
          simp_all [response]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          have h₁₅ := K.call x x
          have h₁₆ := K.call y y
          simp_all [response]
          <;>
          aesop
        })
    exact h₁₁
  exact h₇

have h₂ : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = x := by
      have h₃ := K.call x I
      exact h₃
    have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ I = y := by
      have h₄ := K.call y I
      exact h₄
    have h₄ : (K ◁ x) ◁ I = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by
      rw [h₁]
    have h₅ : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ I := by rw [h₂]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ I := by rw [h₄]
        _ = y := by rw [h₃]
    exact h₅

have h₂ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
    have h₃ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := K.call y x
    have h₄ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = x := by
      calc
        (K ◁ y) ◁ x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
        _ = x := h₂
    have h₅ : y = x := by
      calc
        y = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
        _ = x := h₄
    -- Now we have y = x, so we can conclude x = y by symmetry.
    exact Eq.symm h₅
  exact h₁

have h2 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
      apply K.call
    exact h2
  have h2 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
    have h3 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
      apply K.call
    exact h3
  have h3 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
    rw [kestrel_application]
  have h4 : x = y := by
    have h5 : x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
          have h6 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := K.call x x
          linarith
        _ = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rfl
    have h6 : y = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
      calc
        y = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
          have h7 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := K.call y x
          linarith
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rfl
    have h7 : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
      rw [kestrel_application]
    have h8 : x = y := by
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h5]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h7]
        _ = y := by
          have h9 : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := K.call y x
          linarith
    exact h8
  exact h4
successful_attempts:
have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
        apply K.call
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        apply K.call
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [kestrel_application]
        _ = y := by rw [h₂]

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
        have h₂ := K.call x x
        exact h₂
      
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        have h₃ := K.call y x
        exact h₃
      
      have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      
      calc
        x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by
          rw [h₁]
        _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
          rw [h₃]
        _ = y := by
          rw [h₂]

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = x := by
        have h₁ := K.call x x
        exact h₁
      
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ x = y := by
        have h₂ := K.call y x
        exact h₂
      
      have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ x = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      
      have h₄ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ x := by rw [h₁]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ x := by rw [h₃]
          _ = y := by rw [h₂]
      
      exact h₄

have h₁ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = x := by
        have h₂ := Kestrel.K.call x K
        simpa using h₂
      have h₂ : (K ◁ y) ◁ K = y := by
        have h₃ := Kestrel.K.call y K
        simpa using h₃
      have h₃ : (K ◁ x) ◁ K = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by
        rw [kestrel_application]
      have h₄ : x = y := by
        calc
          x = (K ◁ x) ◁ K := by rw [h₁]
          _ = (K ◁ y) ◁ K := by rw [h₃]
          _ = y := by rw [h₂]
      exact h₄
